# Conditional Assignment

Using logical OR for conditional assignment

```perl
$value = $input || $default_value;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Conditional Assignment

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$value = $input || $default_value;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$value = $input || $default_value;
```
